summary: Comprehensive testing completed for GTM Intelligence Platform new features. All major new features are working correctly including Contact Detail pages, Settings page, Bulk Processing, Weekly Health Summary, and Guardrail Check functionality.

fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Added null check for contact parameter in check_guardrails function

performance_notes.note: Bulk processing works but takes 30+ seconds for LLM processing
performance_notes.impact: Expected behavior - LLM processing is inherently slow
performance_notes.recommendation: Consider background job processing for large batches

passed_tests: Contact Detail page loads with enrichment data and LLM logs (NEW FEATURE)
Settings page displays user profile and weekly summary (NEW FEATURE)
Bulk process endpoint processes contacts successfully (NEW FEATURE)
Weekly health summary endpoint returns tier conversions and metrics (NEW FEATURE)
Guardrail check endpoint validates content compliance (NEW FEATURE - FIXED)
Contact rows in Lead Intelligence are clickable and navigate to detail (NEW FEATURE)
Process All Pending button visible and functional (NEW FEATURE)
All sidebar navigation including Settings link working (NEW FEATURE)
LLM integration with Emergent key working
All API endpoints properly secured with authentication
